arts.ttl: Report: Bayern Munich target Jonathan Tah close to a deal with FC Barcelona
arts.sum: Bayern Munich were at multiple points close to agreeing to a transfer with Bayer Leverkusen for one of their defenders Jonathan Tah. Die Werkself priced Bayern out of the race and the player’s future is uncertain yet again. Barcelona are close to agreeing a deal to sign Jonathan Tah on a free transfer in the summer.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich loanee’s phenomenal form for SSV Ulm leaves club official convinced of his future in the Bundesliga
arts.sum: Pointing to the player of the month at SSV Ulm award he won in September would be the easy way of demonstrating his impressive form, but the squad planner of Die Spatzen, Michael Clemens, had his own verdict to give on the talented 19-year-old: Awesome, then check out the Bavarian Podcast Works — Bundesliga Rundown with Marcus Iredahl on Patreon, Spotify, or below:

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich facing stiff competition from Bundesliga clubs for Tom Bischof
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are targeting Hoffenheim prospect Tom Bischof, who is a 19-year-old midfielder and a highly rated one at that. The Bavarians made their interest known across Germany, and it seems like the rest of the big boys want a piece of the pie:

arts.ttl: Report: Frans Krätzig seems set to return to Bayern Munich in January after dismal VfB Stuttgart loan
arts.sum: Though the U-20 Germany international was likely never going to beat out arguably the senior Germany side’s best left-back in Maximilian Mittelstädt, there was the belief that Die Schwäben’s increased workload following qualification to the Champions League would give Krätzig enough game time. It is a shame to see such a meteoric rise hit such a massive bump, but it is not the first time Krätzig has come up against adversity.

arts.ttl: Training Report: Bayern Munich’s Daniel Peretz to start; Manuel Neuer, Serge Gnabry in doubt vs. Heidenheim; Aleksandar Pavlović to play; Harry Kane works out
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany had some news to deliver regarding the status of both Manuel Neuer and Serge Gnabry during his press conference earlier today. Josip Stanišić worked individually today and is expected to resume team training this month [ @BILD ] pic.twitter.com/k0P413eBtU

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich director drops Alphonso Davies update amid Liverpool and Manchester United contact
arts.sum: Liverpool and Manchester United may be on different levels right now, but they are likely to be going for the same high-level targets in 2025....

arts.ttl: Laser focus: Bayern Munich’s Vincent Kompany wants all energy pointed forward against Heidenheim
arts.sum: Bayern Munich coach Vincent Kompany can look from afar and see the amazing job that Heidenheim has done to get promoted to the Bundesliga — and then stay there (at least for now). It’s an important game for us and it was difficult against them last season too,” Kompany said (as captured by @iMiaSanMia ).

arts.ttl: St. Pauli's Oladapo Afolayan on life in the Bundesliga, being friends with Michael Olise and his World Cup dream
arts.sum: "I can't be thankful enough to the club and the staff who brought me here to give me the opportunity to play in front of a wonderful set of fans," beamed the man who was involved in all three goals as Pauli secured a first Bundesliga home win in 13 years, 3-1 over Kiel on Matchday 12 . In an exclusive interview with bundesliga.com, the Englishman sat down to discuss his love for Pauli and Hamburg, his atypical career path, the quality of Germany's top flight, kickabouts with Bayern's Michael Olise and more...

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich reportedly set to extend Manuel Neuer...but should they?
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer is one of several of the club’s stars in the last year of his contract. Despite the recent injuries and uncertainties, Bayern are still planning to extend Manuel Neuer’s contract.

arts.ttl: ‘Ready to listen’ – Fresh twist in the Alphonso Davies-Real Madrid saga
arts.sum: A fresh twist has on Friday been noted in the long-time saga, linking Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies with a move to Spain with Real Madrid. This comes amid confirmation…
